title: NoWeaponCooldown
description: A minecraft Paper plugin that removes cooldown from all weapons. Yes even shovels and hoes if they are used as weapons. Made for 1.21-1.21.11.
body: This Minecraft Plugin is for all those Users that want the old 1.8 pvp but with all the weapons. I wanted a plugin for this online but even after searching for long I couldn't find it so I just made one.
